reviews.review_description: The 360 degree footage looks convincing and is used in a very intuitive way. Some areas could use a bit more polish, but I am very curious to see how it develops. Great concept.

Fear Simulator relies on a unique and perfectly calibrated mechanic: creating the illusion of height through an ascending sequence (glass elevator) followed by a decisive step onto a narrow plank.
A minimalist yet incredibly compelling concept.
The elevator ride creates a gradual sense of tension, and the opening of the doors triggers the emotional peak.
The three environments renew the challenge without complicating the interface.
A short, intense experience, perfect for testing your tolerance for heights or impressing friends.
Reserved for players ready to face acrophobia.
My video review in french: https://youtu.be/AAMNHHM4dtY
